# ── 步骤 1：打开豆瓣电影首页
            try:
                await page.goto('https://movie.douban.com', wait_until="domcontentloaded")
                await page.wait_for_timeout(CONFIG["spa_settle_ms"])
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_1_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 3：按下回车执行搜索
            try:
                await page.keyboard.press('Enter')
                await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded")
                await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_3_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 5：点击搜索结果第一条
            try:
                await page.locator('#root a').first.click()
                await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded")
                await page.wait_for_timeout(800)
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_5_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 7：提取片名
            try:
                _sel = '#wrapper h1'
                _lim = 9999
                await _wait_for_content(page, _sel)
                _texts = await page.evaluate(_EXTRACT_JS, [_sel, _lim])
                _out = CONFIG["output_dir"] / 'movie.txt'
                _out.write_text("\n".join(_texts), encoding="utf-8")
                print(f"已提取 {{len(_texts)}} 条，写入 {{_out}}")
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_7_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 8：提取评分和短评数
            try:
                _sel = '#interest_sectl'
                _lim = 9999
                await _wait_for_content(page, _sel)
                _texts = await page.evaluate(_EXTRACT_JS, [_sel, _lim])
                _out = CONFIG["output_dir"] / 'movie.txt'
                _out.write_text("\n".join(_texts), encoding="utf-8")
                print(f"已提取 {{len(_texts)}} 条，写入 {{_out}}")
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_8_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 9：提取剧情简介
            try:
                _sel = '#link-report-intra'
                _lim = 9999
                await _wait_for_content(page, _sel)
                _texts = await page.evaluate(_EXTRACT_JS, [_sel, _lim])
                _out = CONFIG["output_dir"] / 'movie.txt'
                _out.write_text("\n".join(_texts), encoding="utf-8")
                print(f"已提取 {{len(_texts)}} 条，写入 {{_out}}")
            except Exception:
